description_long: This street food stall features a sturdy metal frame with a wavy, corrugated metal roof providing shelter for the food and vendor. The front panel is adorned with a bright yellow advertisement banner displaying product images and branding, while the main body consists of glass display shelves showcasing various food items in trays and bowls. The lower section includes storage cabinets with handles, and the entire unit is mounted on four wheels for mobility. The interior shelves are organized with a variety of ingredients and condiments, and a small cutting board with vegetables is visible. The side panels are mostly metallic, with some glass sections allowing partial visibility of the interior. The overall design is practical and functional, suitable for urban street vending.
description: A metal street food stall with a wavy roof, glass display shelves, storage cabinets, and a bright yellow advertisement on the front. Food items and condiments are neatly arranged inside, and the stall is mounted on wheels.
description_view_0: Front view showing the yellow advertisement banner, glass display shelves with food items, and the wavy metal roof.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the metallic side panel and partial visibility of the interior shelves and food trays.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the open glass shelves with food, storage cabinets with handles, and a cutting board with vegetables.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the metallic panel and a glimpse of the interior, including a food tray and cutting board.
attribute_signage: A large yellow advertisement banner with product images, logos, and text is affixed to the front panel. The signage features red and white branding elements and is visually prominent.
attribute_serving_counter: The serving counter is a flat, metallic surface at the front of the stall, protected by a glass shield and featuring trays and containers for food display. It is wide enough for serving and handling transactions.
attribute_food_display: Food is displayed on open glass shelves in trays and bowls, with items clearly visible and accessible to customers. The glass provides some protection while allowing easy viewing.
